UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 2, 2014 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 501. DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION FILED AN OPPOSITION BUT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULES 2.6B. PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS TO THE COURT. ORDER SECOND AMENDED, FINDINGS OF FACT, CONCLUSIONS OF LAW, ND JUDGMENT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: 1) THE CITY IS ENTITLED TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN IT'S FAVOR PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE COURT'S JUNE 30, 2014 ORDER, ATTACHED HERETO AS EXHIBIT A. 2) THE CITY IS THE PREVAILING PARTY IN THIS ACTION. 3) PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION BETWEEN CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION AND STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S DISCLAIMER OF INTEREST, FILED JUNE 26, 2014 IN THIS ACTION, THE CITY HAS WAIVED ANY CLAIM OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AGAINST THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, AND THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HAS WAIVED ANY CLAIM OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS AGAINST THE CITY. THEREFORE, THE CITY SHALL NOT RECOVER ANY FEES OR COSTS AGAINST THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, NOR SHALL THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER ANY FEES OR COSTS AGAINST THE CITY. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Entry Of Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. Judgment was entered via ex parte application on June 30, 2014. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Jul-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria Wong, Deputy City Attorney, (415-554-4721), for CCSF, Plaintiff and moving party.
Stephen A. Silver, Esq. for State of California.

Court hears request for a brief continuance from Plaintiff and arguments on the timing issues from both sides. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Entry Of Judgment is CONTINUED to July 2, 2014 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. Department of Transportation filed an opposition but failed to comply with SF Local Rules 2.6B. Party failed to provide courtesy copies of their papers to the Court. Notice for July 2, 2014 is waived by both parties. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
